concerts.label: An Eclectic Christmas: A Musical Inter-Weave
An Eclectic Christmas: A Musical Inter-Weave

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I knew Joe Hunt, who was just out of the Army, who was going to be the drummer... Eddie Gomez and Joe Hunt were open at the time. So I called them up and hired them to play a week at a club in Boston... playing with Eddie and Joe still at this point.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: This was the band with Kiger, David Young, and myself on the front line, and George Russell, Joe Hunt, and Chuck Israels on – playing bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Bergonzi
about_quotes.evidence: I know there’s a story that Joe Hunt, I heard about Joe Hunt playing with Dexter
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Bergonzi interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 7, 2022
